request.prompt: a delete confirmation whose trigger button shows a badge and a secondary smaller button inside it

children.text: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

findings.rationale: Nested interactive elements create ambiguous click targets and are an accessibility violation: screen readers cannot determine intent and click handling varies across browsers.

children.text: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

findings.message: 'alert-dialog-trigger' must carry non-empty text somewhere in its subtree (none found).
findings.rationale: The trigger must present an accessible label: non-empty text somewhere under the trigger. Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.

children.text: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

repairMessages:
Your surface violates 1 governance rule finding(s) of the "shadcn/ui" design system:

Violation 1: [rule.button-no-interactive-descendants / must]
  At: $.root.children[0].children[0].children[0].children[0] (component: button)
  Forbidden descendant 'button' inside 'button' (at $.root.children[0].children[0]).
  Why: Nested interactive elements create ambiguous click targets and are an accessibility violation: screen readers cannot determine intent and click handling varies across browsers.

A correct example (ex.delete-account-confirmation): {"dspackSurface":"0.1","system":"shadcn/ui","intent":"destructive-action","root":{"component":"card","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-trigger","children":[{"component":"button","props":{"variant":"destructive"},"text":"Delete account"}]},{"component":"alert-dialog-content","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-title","text":"Delete your account?"},{"component":"alert-dialog-description","text":"This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone."},{"component":"alert-dialog-footer","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-cancel","text":"Cancel"},{"component":"alert-dialog-action","text":"Delete account"}]}]}]}]}}

Produce a corrected dspack surface document that fixes every violation above.
Do not change parts of the surface that were not flagged.
Respond with a single JSON object conforming to the provided schema. No commentary.

Your surface violates 1 governance rule finding(s) of the "shadcn/ui" design system:

Violation 1: [rule.trigger-carries-label / must]
  At: $.root.children[0] (component: alert-dialog-trigger)
  'alert-dialog-trigger' must carry non-empty text somewhere in its subtree (none found).
  Why: The trigger must present an accessible label: non-empty text somewhere under the trigger. Protocol projections lift the label from the trigger's subtree (preferring a label-bearing button; lifts are audited) — a trigger with no label text anywhere yields a control with no accessible name and an instance downstream emitters must refuse.

A correct example (ex.delete-account-confirmation): {"dspackSurface":"0.1","system":"shadcn/ui","intent":"destructive-action","root":{"component":"card","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-trigger","children":[{"component":"button","props":{"variant":"destructive"},"text":"Delete account"}]},{"component":"alert-dialog-content","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-title","text":"Delete your account?"},{"component":"alert-dialog-description","text":"This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone."},{"component":"alert-dialog-footer","children":[{"component":"alert-dialog-cancel","text":"Cancel"},{"component":"alert-dialog-action","text":"Delete account"}]}]}]}]}}

Produce a corrected dspack surface document that fixes every violation above.
Do not change parts of the surface that were not flagged.
Respond with a single JSON object conforming to the provided schema. No commentary.

components.title: Delete your account?
components.description: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

warnings.message: $.root: compound 'alert-dialog' subtree flattened onto emitted props (documented casualty; nested props beyond text are not carried).
$.root: A2UI requires a declarative action on AlertDialog; synthesized event 'delete_account'.
